Examples.Title: POST /moderate
Examples.Description: Generated from OpenAPI examples.
Examples.Code:
### POST /moderate
# @name newModerate-moderate
POST {{host}}/moderate
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "content": {
    "type": "string",
    "text": "string"
  },
  "timestamp": 0,
  "channel": "string",
  "contentId": "string",
  "metaType": "profile",
  "authorId": "string",
  "conversationId": "string",
  "metadata": {},
  "doNotStore": true,
  "policies": [
    {
      "flag": true,
      "threshold": 0,
      "id": "string"
    }
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid input data
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authorization not provided
# Content-Type: application/json
# 403
# Description: Insufficient access
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get account details
Examples.Description: Get account details
Examples.Code:
using var client = new ModerationAPIClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Account.AccountGetAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ModerationAPI;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Create an action
Examples.Description: Create an action.
Examples.Code:
### Create an action
# @name actions-create
POST {{host}}/actions
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "key": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "type": "AUTHOR_BLOCK",
  "builtIn": false,
  "queueBehaviour": "NO_CHANGE",
  "filterInQueueIds": [],
  "position": "ALL_QUEUES",
  "possibleValues": [],
  "valueRequired": false,
  "freeText": false
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Action created successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid input data
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authorization not provided
# Content-Type: application/json
# 409
# Description: Action with this key already exists
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Delete an action
Examples.Description: Delete an action and all of its webhooks.
Examples.Code:
### Delete an action
# @name actions-delete
DELETE {{host}}/actions/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Action deleted successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid input data
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authorization not provided
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Not found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Execute moderation action
Examples.Description: Execute a moderation action on one or more content items.
Examples.Code:
### Execute moderation action
# @name actions-execute
POST {{host}}/actions/execute
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "actionKey": "string",
  "contentIds": [
    "string"
  ],
  "authorIds": [
    "string"
  ],
  "value": "string",
  "queueId": "string",
  "duration": 0
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Action executed successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid input data
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authorization not provided
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Not found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get an action
Examples.Description: Get an action by ID.
Examples.Code:
### Get an action
# @name actions-get
GET {{host}}/actions/{{id}}

Examples.Title: List moderation actions
Examples.Description: List all available moderation actions for the authenticated organization.
Examples.Code:
using var client = new ModerationAPIClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Actions.ActionsListAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ModerationAPI;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Create a new author
Examples.Description: Create a new author. Typically not needed as authors are created automatically when content is moderated.
Examples.Code:
### Create a new author
# @name author-openCreate
POST {{host}}/authors
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "profile_picture": "https://example.com",
  "external_link": "https://example.com",
  "name": "string",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "company": "string",
  "metadata": {
    "email_verified": true,
    "phone_verified": true,
    "identity_verified": true,
    "is_paying_customer": true
  },
  "first_seen": 0,
  "last_seen": 0,
  "manual_trust_level": 0,
  "external_id": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid input data
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authorization not provided
# Content-Type: application/json
# 403
# Description: Insufficient access
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get queue items
Examples.Description: Get paginated list of items in a moderation queue with filtering options
Examples.Code:
### Get queue items
# @name queueView-openGetItems
GET {{host}}/queue/{{id}}/items?pageSize=20&pageNumber=1&sortField=createdAt&sortDirection=desc&conversationIds={{conversationIds}}&labels={{labels}}&afterDate={{afterDate}}&beforeDate={{beforeDate}}&includeResolved={{includeResolved}}&authorId={{authorId}}&filteredActionIds={{filteredActionIds}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

Examples.Title: List wordlists
Examples.Description: List all wordlists for the authenticated organization
Examples.Code:
using var client = new ModerationAPIClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Wordlist.WordlistListAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ModerationAPI;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Remove words from wordlist
Examples.Description: Remove words from an existing wordlist
Examples.Code:
### Remove words from wordlist
# @name wordlist-removeWords
DELETE {{host}}/wordlist/{{id}}/words?words={{words}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Words successfully removed from wordlist
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid input data
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authorization not provided
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Not found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Update wordlist
Examples.Description: Update a wordlist
Examples.Code:
### Update wordlist
# @name wordlist-update
PUT {{host}}/wordlist/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string",
  "key": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "words": [
    "string"
  ],
  "strict": true
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Wordlist updated successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid input data
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authorization not provided
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Not found
# Content-Type: application/json
